summary: Completed comprehensive testing of OpenClaw Installer Dashboard - 7-step wizard application with all features working correctly. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend UI/UX excellent with seamless integration.
passed_tests: System check returns Windows 11 mock data with 7/10 checks passed
Skills endpoint returns 30 skills across 9 categories with 11 popular skills
AI providers returns 5 providers (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, Local, Custom)
API key validation correctly validates prefixes for all providers
Save config successfully stores configuration to MongoDB
Generate script creates valid PowerShell installer script
Welcome page renders with feature cards and Begin Setup button
System check page displays dependency scan with PASS/WARN/INFO tags
Configuration page install method selection, path input, AI provider selection working
API Keys page paste fields for all providers, custom key add/remove functional
Security page preset selection, toggle switches, file/shell access levels working
Skills page search, category filter, Select Popular, individual skill selection working
Review page summary cards, Generate Script, Download .ps1, Simulate Install working
Sidebar navigation works - clicking any step navigates correctly
Step transitions animate smoothly with proper state management
